title: Chapter 185
content:
Chapter 185: Bathed In Love

The morning light filtered softly through the curtains, painting the bedroom in gentle golden hues.

Stan woke first, still spooned tightly behind Sophie, his arm draped over her waist and his face nestled in her hair. She stirred moments later, letting out a sleepy, contented hum as she pressed back against him.

"Good morning, my love," Stan whispered, kissing the back of her neck tenderly. His hand gave her breast one last affectionate squeeze before sliding up to hold her closer.

Sophie turned in his arms to face him, her eyes sparkling with warmth. "Good morning, handsome. Waking up like this... with you still holding me... I could get used to this every single day."

They shared a slow, lazy kiss, full of morning affection. After a few peaceful minutes of cuddling and soft whispers about how perfect the night had been, Stan gently brushed a strand of hair from her face.

"I should head to the gym soon," he said reluctantly. "I’ve been slacking a bit while traveling. Need to get back into my routine."

Sophie’s lips curved into a playful smile. She stretched against him like a cat, then winked. "It’s been so long since I’ve done yoga. My body feels a little stiff after last night..." She let the words hang teasingly. "Maybe I can join you? You can guide me through some poses... and maybe help me with some cardio too."

Stan’s grin widened, his eyes lighting up with both amusement and desire. "You’re impossible, you know that? But I love it. I was planning to hit a public gym today, but since you’re coming with me, let’s go to my apartment instead. I’ve got a private gym setup there. I can do my reps while you do your yoga... and I’ll happily show you around my place for the first time."

Sophie’s face brightened with genuine excitement. She leaned in and kissed him deeply, pouring her affection into it. "I’d love that. I want to see where you live... your space. It feels like another step closer to you."

"Quick bath before we go?" she suggested, tracing a finger down his chest.

"Only if you’re joining me," Stan replied, kissing her forehead.

...

They slipped into the bathroom together, where Sophie had already prepared the large bathtub.

She filled it with warm water scented with vanilla and lavender bath oil, creating a soft, aromatic steam that filled the room. Bubbles gently foamed on the surface as they both undressed.

Sophie stepped in first, then guided Stan to sit between her legs, his back resting against her chest.

She wrapped her arms around him from behind, pressing soft kisses along his shoulder as the warm water enveloped them both.

"You’re spoiling me," Stan murmured, relaxing fully into her embrace. The scented water felt heavenly against his skin, and Sophie’s soft body behind him made everything feel intimate and safe.

"That’s the plan," she whispered lovingly, reaching for a soft sponge. She started bathing him slowly, running the sponge across his broad chest in tender circles, then down his arms, taking her time to appreciate every inch of him. "I love taking care of you, Stan. You work so hard... you deserve to be pampered."

Her hands moved with deliberate care, massaging his shoulders and neck while the warm water soothed his muscles. Stan sighed deeply, tilting his head back to rest on her shoulder.

"You make me feel like the luckiest man alive," he said softly. "Waking up next to you, now this... I don’t ever want to leave this moment."

Sophie smiled and kissed his temple. Her hands ventured lower, sliding over his abdomen. "Good. Because I don’t plan on letting you go." Her voice dropped to a sultry whisper. "You know... feeling you so hard against me last night got me thinking. I love how your body reacts to mine. Even now, just being close like this..."

She wrapped her fingers gently around his cock beneath the soapy water, stroking him with slow, loving motions. It wasn’t rushed, it was sensual and affectionate, her thumb gliding over the sensitive head as she held him close. Stan groaned softly, his hand covering hers, guiding her rhythm without pressure.

"Sophie... you’re too good to me," he breathed, voice thick with pleasure. "I love your touch. The way you hold me like I’m yours."

"You are mine," she replied tenderly, continuing the gentle handjob while cuddling him from behind. "Every part of you. I love feeling you get harder in my hand... knowing I can make you feel this good. Does it feel nice, baby?"

"Unbelievably nice," Stan admitted, his breathing growing heavier. He turned his head to kiss her deeply as her strokes remained steady and loving. "You’re so sexy when you take control like this. So caring... so perfect."

They stayed like that for a while, cuddling in the warm, fragrant water, exchanging soft kisses and whispered words of love while Sophie continued pleasuring him with her hand. The moment was intimate, unhurried, and deeply romantic.

Eventually, Stan reached his release with a low groan, pulsing in her gentle grip as she held him through it, murmuring sweet praises in his ear.

After a few minutes of peaceful recovery, wrapped in each other’s arms and enjoying the scented water, Sophie kissed his cheek. "Come on, love. Let’s get properly cleaned up."

They stood together and moved under the shower. The warm spray cascaded over them as they took turns scrubbing each other, Sophie soaping Stan’s body with reverent touches, and him returning the favor, massaging soap over her breasts, hips, and back with equal adoration.

Laughter mixed with soft moans as they rinsed off, stealing kisses under the falling water.

By the time they stepped out, both were glowing, refreshed, bonded, and filled with excitement for the day ahead.

Stan wrapped a towel around her first, pulling her close for one more lingering kiss. "Today’s already perfect because it starts with you. Ready to show you my world, Sophie."

"I can’t wait," she replied, eyes shining with love. "Lead the way, my naughty, wonderful man."

Their connection felt stronger than ever, playful, passionate, and deeply heartwarming.
